location.office_time_required: majority of work remote; most teams meet once or twice per quarter for 2-4 consecutive days at a time for in-person onsites

level_signals: Owns long-term vision and multi-year strategy for the platform
Mentors other PMs and influences org-level best practices
Base salary range $187,900–$260,000 USD, consistent with Principal IC level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: BA/BS in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience
8+ years of product management experience, including ownership of complex technical or platform products
must_haves.qualifier: including ownership of complex technical or platform products

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong foundation in machine learning concepts and modern AI systems (e.g., LLMs, RAG, tool-calling, memory)
Experience leading cross-functional teams to deliver AI/ML-powered products from concept to production at scale
Demonstrated ability to define product strategy and drive alignment across senior stakeholders in ambiguous, fast-moving environments
Excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational leadership skills

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in machine learning engineering or research (either through direct work experience or close partnership with ML teams)
Experience building and scaling platforms or internal tools used by multiple teams
Experience operating in highly regulated industries (e.g., fintech, healthcare), with a strong understanding of compliance and risk considerations
Deep familiarity with evaluation frameworks, simulation environments, and model performance measurement
Strong product intuition and design sensibility, particularly for tools serving non-technical users
Track record of influencing org-level decisions and driving adoption of new platforms or technologies

explicitly_excluded: Candidates based in Quebec, Canada are not eligible: 'For roles based in Canada, please note that we are not currently able to hire in Quebec.'

scope.surface: Internal Agentic Platform — infrastructure enabling autonomous AI agents across Onboarding, Servicing, Fraud, and Operations; includes tools for agent configuration, evaluation, orchestration, and integration
scope.business_model: internal platform / developer tooling (B2B2E); Upstart is a fintech AI lending marketplace
primary_metrics_inferred: Reduction in cost and latency through model lifecycle optimization
Speed and safety of agent deployment by non-technical users
core_responsibilities: Set and drive the long-term vision and multi-year strategy for Upstart's Agentic Platform
Own and evolve the platform roadmap, making high-leverage prioritization decisions
Lead development of product experiences enabling non-technical users to build, test, and deploy agents without writing code
Establish evaluation, simulation, and safety frameworks for agents in a regulated environment
Define architectural strategy for agentic systems including orchestration, tool usage, memory, RAG, and state management
Drive company-wide adoption by partnering with senior stakeholders
Make strategic decisions on model lifecycle management (frontier vs. fine-tuned/distilled)
Mentor other PMs and influence best practices

compensation.equity_form: annual equity grants that vest quarterly; Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP) with discounted stock purchase options (US only)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($187,900–$260,000 USD base)

Generous benefits including 2:1 401(k) match up to $15,000, ESPP, wellness and productivity allowances
Explicitly welcomes ML Researcher/Engineer-to-PM career transitions
Role has company-wide strategic importance with executive stakeholder exposure
